content.en:
As time passed, forces such as the Ten Dao Mountains also became aware of this growth-type ancient nest, so they also sent many Sevenfold Ancestors over.

In addition, they also brought the seedlings of the Devouring Tree and planted them inside the Growing Nest.

For this situation, there is no way to stop the Nine-Story Building, after all, this Growing Ancient Nest does not belong to the Nine-Story Building at the moment!

As for the ownership of the growing ancient nest, it has little to do with Ye Tian.

At this point, all he wanted to do was get enough benefits inside this nest.

this day.

Ye Tian once again found a primordial artifact with good things inside this growing ancient nest.

This primordial artifact is huge, but it reminds that similar to ginseng, it is blood-red all over its body, and even releases blood-red mist that can devour cultivators.

"This is a blood ginseng artifact!"

Ye Tian was a little excited.

The Blood Ginseng Ancient Artifact is one of the most valuable Sevenfold Ancestor level Primordial Antiquities, and the Blood Ginseng Gold Liquid contained in its body is one of the most suitable treasures for improving cultivation, and it also faintly improves the life level, which is very suitable for the Sevenfold Ancestor.

"Sure enough, this kind of growth ancient nest contains a lot of extremely precious primordial antiquities, which are not comparable to ordinary ancient nests!"

Without saying a word, Ye Tian shot directly.

Although the strength of the Blood Ginseng Ancient Artifact was comparable to that of the powerful Top Sevenfold Ancestor, it was still not Ye Tian's opponent.

Thundered!!!

After a few moves, Ye Tian killed this blood ginseng artifact and took away the blood ginseng gold liquid in its body.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to look for blood ginseng artifacts in this area, and there was an existence with a talent for replication, and his speed of searching for blood ginseng artifacts was many times faster than that of other original ancestors.

In the end, Ye Tian found thirteen blood ginseng artifacts, but he didn't find them again.

......

As the years passed, a large number of Sevenfold Ancestors came in, and many Sevenfold Ancestors came out with great harvests.

Of course, there were also many Sevenfold Ancestors who remained permanently inside this ancient nest and died at the hands of those primordial antiquities.

But even so, there were still quite a few Sevenfold Ancestors who ventured into this growing ancient nest.

However, even though the countless primordial artifacts inside were killed, the growth of the nest was only slightly suppressed, and it was still expanding.

Ye Tian knew very well that only when the Devouring Life Tree really grew could he suppress this growth-type ancient nest.

However, it also takes time for the Devouring Lifetree to grow, and it doesn't grow all at once!

Hanhai Yellow Building.

Ye Tian's duplicate body was staying here, and at this time he was using the blood ginseng gold liquid to improve his cultivation.

Grunt!

Ye Tian swallowed some blood ginseng gold liquid in one gulp and quickly refined it.

Rumble!!!

The unimaginable energy quickly increased his cultivation, and this improvement effect far exceeded that of other resource treasures.

At this moment, the speed at which his cultivation was improved was too fast!

"It's worthy of the Blood Ginseng Gold Liquid, the effect of improving cultivation is too good! With so much Blood Ginseng Gold Liquid, I even have the hope of raising my cultivation to the mid-stage realm of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor in one breath this time!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Another period of time has passed, and the battle situation on the side of the Growing Nest is deadlocked.

Although forces such as the Nine-Story Building sent more Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors over, the Primordial Artifacts of the Growing Ancient Nest increased during this time.

The Primordial Antiquities are endless, and they can even make the Nest give birth to more Primordial Artifacts if they are willing.

Therefore, it is not so simple to completely take down this growing ancient nest.

On this day, after refining all the blood ginseng gold liquid and other resources, Ye Tian's cultivation finally completed a breakthrough.

Mid-Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor!

Ye Tian reached this realm, and his strength skyrocketed directly!

"Although Xiu Wei has only broken through a small realm, his strength is much stronger than in the past, with my current strength, it should be enough to rival or beat the ordinary half-step eightfold ancestor, but it is still only a half-step eightfold ancestor like my servant Qingxuan Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In other words, he could only bully the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor who comprehended the Eightfold Yuan Dao now.

But even so, he was satisfied!

......

Growing nests.

Ye Tian, with the cultivation of the middle stage of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, encountered some primordial artifacts that were difficult to kill in the past, but now he could easily kill them in seconds.

Still, he couldn't help much.

In the Nine-Fold Building, the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors who are even stronger than him abound, but some of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors did not come from the main body, but refined a clone, and the strength they exerted was not strong.

However, the top Sevenfold Origin Ancestors sitting here are the peak Demon Dao Ancestors of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestors who have reached a life level of more than 20 in the Nine-Story Building and comprehended the Extreme Yuan Dao.

Their strength far surpassed the current Ye Tian, if the situation was so severe that even they couldn't deal with it, Ye Tian couldn't do anything.

Right now, Ye Tian can only kill some more primordial artifacts and obtain some resources as much as possible to improve his strength.

Abrupt.

A piece of news came, which shocked Ye Tian a little.

"What, the Devouring Life-Devouring Tree planted by the Nine-Story Building has been destroyed?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

You must know that the Devouring Life Tree has been growing for a long time, plus there are a large number of Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors in charge, there are dozens of Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors who are stronger than him, and there are a large number of formations to protect it.

In such a situation, it was suddenly destroyed, as if there was not even a chance to call for help.

Soon, he learned the details.

It turned out that a dense black-veined egg stone suddenly appeared inside this ancient nest, which was a primordial artifact whose strength was comparable to the peak of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, and its individual combat effectiveness was average, but it had a terrifying ability - self-explosion!

The black-veined egg stone can accumulate energy and explode instantly, exerting more than 100 times more powerful than its own attack power.

If the Sevenfold Ancestor of the same level encounters a black-veined eggstone, if the life-saving ability is not good, it will be killed by the self-explosion of the black-veined eggstone, and everyone will die together.

The black-veined egg stones are primordial antiquities, and they are not cultivators, so they have no fear of thinking, so they can easily explode themselves.

This time, a dense black-veined egg stone appeared, directly surrounding the Devouring Life Tree of the Nine-Story Building, and it exploded in an instant.

In an instant, all the surrounding formations were annihilated, and one Dao Ancestor was blown up to annihilation.

This time, dozens of official members alone have fallen, and other Dao Ancestors can only escape, otherwise the losses will be even greater.

"Dozens of official members have fallen! The Nine-Story Building has suffered a big loss this time!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

You must know that every official member of the Nine-Fold Building is extremely demonic, and in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm, you must raise your life level to 6 or above, and comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao, before you are eligible to become an official member of the Nine-Fold Building!

For example, in the Hanhai District, it will take a long time to hope for the birth of a full-fledged member of the Nine-Story Building!

And there are only a few official members of the Hanhai Yellow Building, and this loss is equivalent to the annihilation of nearly ten Yellow Buildings at once!
